column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Pinellas until Aug 04 6:15PM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.
Is it over bc I'm freaking out!!
Denis Phillips rule #7: don't freak unless Denis freaks. I pray peace for you. Be wise but be calm.
Ty
why freaking out? Unless you’re on the water on first floor, we get harsher afternoon and evening daily storms
You must be tone deaf. So many I know have major flooding in their homes from this storm and still have not recovered from Ian. It depends on where you are located, it's not a one-size-fits-all.
I said unless you’re in flood zone. Your comprehension is lacking. Stop with your panicking.

I'm not in panic mode, no reason to be where I am. And that is not my nature anyway. My comprehension is just fine. There are trees down due to damage/rot from Ian, boats loose and high water in homes for many who are not recovered from Ian. Most of FL at this point is a flood zone as Ian changed the make up of the soil/sand and water is not draining as it should. Oh, and then there is over development of permeable surfaces, mangroves destroyed...... no flood zone needed to cause hardship for many.
warning is expired! Be prepared for more warnings though, the tropical storm isn’t over
